content.thinking: The `bd show` command crashed with a nil pointer dereference in the Dolt database driver. This is a known transient issue with embedded Dolt - likely a lock contention or corrupt state. Let me retry once.

content.text: Dolt crash on `bd show` - likely transient lock contention. Let me retry.

input.description: Retry showing patrol wisp after brief delay

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-uqlqed [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-23 · Updated: 2026-02-23

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-44wxgv: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-bmku1t: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-p1v8wc: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-pyls3h: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
